name: Space 3D
description: Space is a free leisure online game for boys played on PuzzleGame. Control the astronaut to float in the sky and collect diamonds. Pay attention to avoid all kinds of obstacles. Levels get harder every time and require skills and thinking to be beaten. Play on Mobile, Tablet, or Desktop. It is super addictive. How many levels can you clear?
tags: 3D, Android, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Online, Puzzle, Space
